channel.title: Study on Pony of Shadows
channel.description: Recent content in Study on Pony of Shadows

item.title: Something you should do on class
item.description:
• Treat the lesson as a relaxing lecture
  • Just listen to the interesting parts
  • Remorize vocabulary
  • Make LaTex notes on knowldge I have understand (Practice vim)
  • Sleep
  • learn simple backgrounds of difficult knowledge
  • Write short programs
